# refresh-supabase-env-vars
Description: Refreshes Supabase function environment variables from Infisical without redeploying code, by fetching new secrets, writing the .env file, and restarting the functions container.
Source: project
1. Trigger the environment variable update flow within the automation platform, typically found under `infrastructure.supabase` and named `supabase-functions-env-update`.
2. Provide the required input parameter `env_prefix`.
3. Set the `env_prefix` value to the specific identifier for the environment whose secrets need to be refreshed.
This process will fetch fresh secrets, update the `.env` file, and restart the functions container, ensuring new secrets are applied efficiently.
